name: Barrier
description: When damage would be taken, negate it and lose 1 Barrier stack.

name: Confusion
description: Your attacks have a 33% chance of randomly changing target and another 33% chance of completely missing.

name: Hex
description: When receiving damage, receive extra magic damage equal to the number of Hex stacks. Then, lose all the stacks.

name: Invulnerable
description: You don't take any damage or receive any negative Status. At the end of the round, lose your invulnerability.

name: Poison
description: At the end of the round, take poison damage equal to the number of Poison stacks. Then, lose half the stacks rounded down (minimum 1).

name: Rage
description: Whenever you attack, deal 1 extra physical damage for each Rage stack. Then, lose half the stacks rounded down (minimum 1).

name: Stun
description: Skip your turn. Then, break free from the stun.

name: Weakness
description: Deal 1 less physical damage when attacking for each Weakness stack. At the end of the round, lose half the stacks rounded down (minimum 1).

name: Wound
description: When receiving damage, receive 1 extra physical damage for every Wound stack. At the end of the round, lose half the stacks rounded down (minimum 1).
